findings.title: Injection escalates across the agent mesh
findings.description: A prompt-injection payload smuggled hidden instructions that hijacked the planner agent's goal AND caused a sub-agent to escalate privilege by impersonating the orchestrator across the multi-agent mesh. One finding spans Goal Hijacking and Inter-Agent Trust Escalation.

findings.title: Poisoned tool from registry reached via MCP
findings.description: An unvetted third-party tool, installed unpinned and unsigned from a public registry, was exposed to the agent through an MCP server. This is both an agentic supply-chain compromise and MCP / plugin abuse.

findings.title: Disclosed tool list used to craft injection
findings.description: The agent revealed its tool list and system prompt; the attacker then used that disclosed capability inventory to craft a targeted prompt injection that hijacked the agent's objective. Capability disclosure feeding goal hijacking.
